ghaṭā [ghaṭ bhāve aṅ]
1 An endeavour, effort, exertion.
2 A number, troop, assemblage; pralayaghanaghaṭā  K. 111 ; kauśikaghaṭā  U. 2. 29 ; 5. 6 ;  Māl. 5. 19 ; mātaṃgaghaṭā  Śi. 1. 64. 
3 A troop of elephants assembled for martial purposes.
4 An assembly.
